name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause late payments. We generate weekly cash flow forecasts from bank transactions instead of manual cash flow tracking spreadsheets.
problem_solved: lack of accurate cash flow forecasting

locked_fields.primary_problem: lack of accurate cash flow forecasting
